items.title: 美媒：智谱GLM-5.2漏洞挖掘能力达到Mythos水平
items.summary: Article claims a model reaches Mythos-like vulnerability discovery capability. Treat as a security claim until independent safety evidence exists.

items.title: 任务完成率正在杀死 AI Agent？听昆仑万维Skywork产品总监分享Agent真指标
items.summary: Article discusses task-completion metrics for AI agents. Treat as a benchmark/adoption claim, not as proof of agent reliability.

items.title: 两家企业同称物理AI第一股，Momenta到底算不算正统？
items.summary: Article claims competing physical-AI company positioning. Treat as physical-AI deployment/financial positioning evidence requiring source checks.

items.title: Grammarly 母公司收购GPTZero：一边帮你用AI写，一边帮你查AI写？
items.summary: Article claims an AI-writing and AI-detection workflow merger. Treat as content-authenticity/security claim until detection evidence is validated.

items.title: Karpathy投了一家AI记忆公司，撞名 DeepSeek Engram 记忆架构
items.summary: Article claims a model memory architecture/company signal. Treat as architecture claim requiring technical evidence.
